capacity_policy: Run after schema changes touching tasks, artifacts, outcomes, trace events, or service requests.
Run before introducing external workflow engines or high-volume worker queues.
Use 500000 and 1000000 row scenarios before claiming production-scale readiness.

query_timings.label: count_open_tasks
plan: SCAN tasks USING COVERING INDEX idx_tasks_status_priority_created

query_timings.label: lane_recent_tasks
plan: SEARCH tasks USING INDEX idx_tasks_lane_created (lane_id=?)

query_timings.label: status_priority_backlog
plan: SEARCH tasks USING INDEX idx_tasks_status_priority_created (status=?)
USE TEMP B-TREE FOR LAST TERM OF ORDER BY

query_timings.label: lane_recent_artifacts
plan: SEARCH artifacts USING INDEX idx_artifacts_lane_created (lane_id=?)

query_timings.label: task_artifact_outcome_join
plan: SEARCH t USING INDEX idx_tasks_lane_created (lane_id=?)
SEARCH a USING INDEX idx_artifacts_task_created (task_id=?) LEFT-JOIN
SEARCH o USING INDEX idx_outcomes_task_created (task_id=?) LEFT-JOIN

plan: SEARCH service_requests USING INDEX idx_service_requests_status_created (status=?)
